description.description: Human-readable description for the generated HTTP API.

domain.description: Optional custom domain and Route 53 settings for exposing this API Gateway with a human-readable hostname.

floci.description: Local Floci custom domain and Route 53 settings.

name.description: Full custom domain name for this API Gateway, such as app.dev.example.com. Terraform maps this domain to the HTTP API.

zoneName.description: Existing Route 53 hosted zone name that owns the domain record, such as dev.example.com. AWS deployments look up this zone; Floci deployments create it locally.

arn.description: Explicit ACM certificate ARN for this API Gateway custom domain.

lookupDomain.description: Domain name to use when looking up an ISSUED ACM certificate, such as *.dev.example.com.

certificate.description: ACM certificate config for AWS API Gateway custom domains. Use arn for explicit references or lookupDomain to find an existing issued certificate.

aws.description: AWS custom domain and Route 53 settings.

name.description: Full custom domain name for this API Gateway, such as app.dev.example.com. Terraform maps this domain to the HTTP API.

zoneName.description: Existing Route 53 hosted zone name that owns the domain record, such as dev.example.com. AWS deployments look up this zone; Floci deployments create it locally.

arn.description: Explicit ACM certificate ARN for this API Gateway custom domain.

lookupDomain.description: Domain name to use when looking up an ISSUED ACM certificate, such as *.dev.example.com.

certificate.description: ACM certificate config for AWS API Gateway custom domains. Use arn for explicit references or lookupDomain to find an existing issued certificate.

routes.description: HTTP API routes and their integration targets.

title: Platform API Gateway Service
description: YAML schema for AWS API Gateway HTTP APIs deployed by the platform.
